name: facebook-api-plugin
description: Interact with the Facebook Graph API to post updates, fetch user/profile/page data, and manage Facebook content.
author: AGNT User

schema.title: Facebook Post Status
schema.description: Posts a status update to a user's Facebook timeline or page.

recipientType.description: Choose whether to post on user timeline or a page.

pageId.description: Facebook Page ID (required if posting to a page).

link.description: Optional link to attach to the post.

postId.description: ID of the created Facebook post.

success.description: Whether the post was successfully created.

error.description: Error message if the request failed.

schema.title: Facebook Get Profile
schema.description: Fetches the profile data of the authenticated user or a Facebook page.

profileType.description: Specify whether the profile is a user or a page.

pageId.description: Facebook Page ID (required if profileType is 'page').

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve (e.g., 'id,name,picture').

success.description: Whether the profile data was successfully retrieved.

error.description: Error message if the request failed.

schema.title: Facebook List Managed Pages
schema.description: Retrieves a list of Facebook pages managed by the authenticated user.

pages.description: Array of page objects managed by the user.

success.description: Whether the pages were successfully retrieved.

error.description: Error message if the request failed.
